front:
SKILL 31 вҖ” DRESSING A RESIDENT
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Resident's chosen clothing, nonskid shoes
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Let RESIDENT CHOOSE what to wear
вӯҗ TOP: neck opening first, then WEAKER ARM in sleeve, then stronger вҖ” smooth back of shirt last
вӯҗ PANTS: WEAKER LEG through opening first; SOCKS: toe opening first, unroll up вҖ” heel pocket OVER heel
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Ask resident what they want to wear вҖ” let THEM choose.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Raise head вҖ” resident sitting UP.
5. вӯҗ Bath blanket over resident. Pull top linens to foot. Remove clothing from STRONGER SIDE FIRST, then weaker side.
6. вӯҗ PULLOVER TOP: scrunch top, guide NECK OPENING over head first. Reach into WEAK SIDE sleeve, grasp weak hand, pull through. Then strong arm. Lean forward вҖ” smooth back down.
   FRONT-FASTENING TOP: WEAK arm first into sleeve. Bring shirt around back. STRONG arm in. Fasten front.
7. вӯҗ PANTS: WEAK LEG through opening FIRST. Then strong leg. Slide up as far as possible. Resident pushes hips UP вҖ” pull pants over buttocks and up to waist (or roll side to side). Fasten.
8. вӯҗ SOCKS (start with WEAK FOOT): roll sock inside-out down to toe. Stretch toe opening. Resident's toes in. Unroll up foot and over heel вҖ” HEEL POCKET exactly over heel. No twists or ridges.
9. SHOES (WEAK foot first): open fully, guide toe in, ease heel in. Fasten completely.
10. Check вҖ” right-side-out, flat, buttons/zippers closed, waistband proper. Remove bath blanket.
11. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
12. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 32 вҖ” UNDRESSING A RESIDENT
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Bath blanket, clean gown if needed
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Bath blanket on FIRST вҖ” work under it throughout for privacy
вӯҗ FRONT-FASTENING: remove STRONG side first, then weak
вӯҗ PANTS: resident lifts hips вҖ” slide pants down and off; if unable, roll side to side
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed.
4. вӯҗ Drape BATH BLANKET over resident вҖ” shoulders to feet. Reach under, fan-fold TOP LINENS to foot. Bath blanket = only covering.
5. Reach under blanket to assist. Let resident do as much as possible.
6. Reach under and undo all BUTTONS, ZIPPERS, SNAPS, VELCRO.
7. вӯҗ FRONT-FASTENING TOP: slide off STRONG SIDE first (down strong arm and off). Then bring garment over toward WEAK SIDE and off.
   PULLOVER: raise head of bed slightly. Pull shirt up to chest. STRONG ARM off first. Over back to neck. WEAK ARM off. Pull over HEAD.
8. вӯҗ PANTS: unfasten waistband. RESIDENT LIFTS HIPS by pressing hands/feet into mattress. Slide pants AND undergarment DOWN past hips, down legs, off feet. If CANNOT lift вҖ” ROLL to one side, pull down on that side, roll to other side, pull down, slide off.
9. Help into clean gown if needed. Remove bath blanket, replace with regular blanket.
10. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
11. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 33 вҖ” APPLYING ELASTIC SUPPORT STOCKINGS
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Elastic support stockings
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Gather stocking DOWN to heel area (inside-out) before putting on
вӯҗ HEEL POCKET must align exactly over resident's heel
вӯҗ Check completed stocking: ANY wrinkle, fold, or twist = problem (cuts circulation) вҖ” smooth completely
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed.
4. Resident lies SUPINE flat. Remove socks/shoes. Fold blanket away from ONE LEG ONLY.
5. вӯҗ Gather stocking вҖ” push hands toward toe end, scrunching it inside-out down to HEEL AREA. Like scrunching a tube sock to just the foot section.
6. вӯҗ Stretch toe opening. Slide resident's TOES in, then full foot. HEEL POCKET directly over resident's HEEL.
7. вӯҗ Unroll stocking UP the leg вҖ” smooth as you go. Calf, over knee, up thigh.
8. вӯҗ INSPECT entire stocking вҖ” run hands over it. ANY wrinkle, fold, or twist = circulation problem. Fix completely. Heel pocket over heel? Toe opening positioned per manufacturer?
9. Cover leg. Repeat steps 4вҖ“8 for OTHER LEG.
10. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order.
11. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 34 вҖ” CHANGING INCONTINENT BRIEFS
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, clean incontinent brief, bed protector, peri care supplies
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Roll soiled brief INWARD ON ITSELF вҖ” soiled surface folded inside вҖ” before disposing
вӯҗ Complete PERINEAL CARE before applying clean brief
вӯҗ Fasten tabs snug but not tight вҖ” two fingers should fit under waistband
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
4. Fold back sheet/blanket to expose brief. Pull apart side TABS (both sides).
5. Grab FRONT PANEL вҖ” roll DOWNWARD from waistband toward groin then between legs.
6. вӯҗ Before fully removing: cover perineal area with TOWEL. Keep resident covered.
7. Roll resident so BACK IS TOWARD YOU (onto side, away from you).
8. вӯҗ Grab soiled brief вҖ” ROLL INWARD ON ITSELF (soiled surface folds inside). Dispose per policy.
9. While resident on side: complete PERINEAL CARE (Skills 25 or 26).
10. Change gloves + wash hands.
11. Unfold CLEAN BRIEF. Hold by BACK PANEL. Slide back panel under resident's buttocks вҖ” back half positioned behind them.
12. Roll resident BACK onto back вҖ” they lie on back half of brief. Pull FRONT PANEL up between legs over groin. Smooth flat.
13. вӯҗ FASTEN TABS both sides вҖ” snug but not tight (two fingers under waistband).
14. Restore clothing and linens. Remove gloves.
15. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 35 вҖ” ASSISTING INDEPENDENT RESIDENT WITH BEDPAN
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Bedpan, bed protector, gloves, toilet paper
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Resident lifts hips on "three" вҖ” slide BED PROTECTOR then BEDPAN into position
вӯҗ Standard pan: wider end under BUTTOCKS; Fracture pan: handle toward FOOT, flat lip under buttocks
вӯҗ Leave room and close door for privacy вҖ” resident calls when done
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Bed to WAIST HEIGHT. Lower head of bed FLAT.
4. Gloves on. Bath blanket over resident. Pull top linens down. Remove undergarments under blanket.
5. "Lift hips on three вҖ” push feet and hands into mattress. 1-2-3." Resident rises.
6. вӯҗ Slide BED PROTECTOR under buttocks. Then slide BEDPAN into position:
   вҖў STANDARD: wider end under BUTTOCKS
   вҖў FRACTURE PAN: handle toward FOOT, flat elevated lip under buttocks
7. Discard gloves. Wash hands.
8. вӯҗ RAISE head of bed to comfortable semi-sitting position. Pillows if needed. Leave side rails up. Bed to LOWEST.
9. Bath blanket covering. Toilet paper within reach. Call light in resident's DOMINANT HAND. "I'll step out вҖ” press when done." CLOSE DOOR.
10. When called: return. Wash hands. CLEAN GLOVES.
11. Raise bed. Lower head to FLAT. Keep resident covered.
12. вӯҗ "Lift hips вҖ” 1-2-3." Resident rises. Slide bedpan STRAIGHT OUT keeping LEVEL. Cover immediately.
13. Peri care if needed вҖ” FRONT TO BACK. Change gloves. Help with undergarments. Restore linens.
14. Remove bed protector. Discard supplies. Linens in hamper. Change gloves. Wash hands.
15. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light.
16. Carry covered bedpan to bathroom. Note COLOR, ODOR, CONSISTENCY. Empty slowly along toilet bowl edge.
17. Turn on faucet with paper towel. Rinse bedpan with COLD WATER. Empty. Flush. Store.
18. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 36 вҖ” ASSISTING DEPENDENT RESIDENT WITH BEDPAN
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Bedpan, bed protector, gloves, toilet paper
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Roll resident TOWARD you, position bedpan against buttocks, push far edge INTO mattress вҖ” roll resident BACK onto bedpan
вӯҗ Removing: hold bedpan FLAT, roll resident BACK ONTO SIDE toward you вҖ” they roll OFF bedpan
вӯҗ Note COLOR, ODOR, CONSISTENCY before emptying
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Bed to WAIST HEIGHT. Lower head FLAT.
4. Gloves on. Bath blanket over resident. Pull top linens down. Remove undergarments under blanket.
5. вӯҗ Roll resident TOWARD YOU вҖ” onto side, facing you. Back exposed. Bed protector if needed.
6. вӯҗ Position bedpan AGAINST their BUTTOCKS. Push FAR EDGE OF BEDPAN DOWN INTO MATTRESS. Roll resident BACK onto back вҖ” they roll ONTO bedpan, now directly under buttocks.
7. Discard gloves. Wash hands.
8. Raise head to semi-sitting. Pillows if needed. Side rails up. Bed to LOWEST. Bath blanket covering. Toilet paper + call light within reach. CLOSE DOOR.
9. When signaled: return. Wash hands. CLEAN GLOVES. Raise bed. Lower head FLAT.
10. вӯҗ CANNOT raise hips: hold BEDPAN FLAT with one hand. Roll resident TOWARD YOU вҖ” they roll OFF bedpan. Slide bedpan out. COVER immediately.
11. Peri care вҖ” FRONT TO BACK. Change gloves. Help with undergarments. Restore linens.
12. Remove bed protector. Discard supplies. Linens in hamper. Change gloves. Wash hands.
13. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light.
14. Carry covered bedpan to bathroom. Note COLOR, ODOR, CONSISTENCY. Empty slowly, no splashing.
15. Faucet with paper towel. Rinse with COLD WATER. Empty. Flush. Store.
16. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 37 вҖ” ASSISTING MALE RESIDENT WITH URINAL
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Urinal, bed protector, gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ If unable to self-position: guide PENIS INTO urinal opening while gloved вҖ” replace covers over urinal
вӯҗ Raise head of bed slightly for urination вҖ” then lower to LOWEST
вӯҗ Note COLOR, ODOR, QUALITY before emptying; rinse with COLD WATER
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
4. Slide BED PROTECTOR under resident's buttocks and hips.
5. вӯҗ Hold urinal by handle. If resident CAN self-help вҖ” hand it to him. If CANNOT: gloved, reach under bath blanket, position urinal BETWEEN legs, guide PENIS into urinal opening. Replace covers.
6. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
7. вӯҗ RAISE HEAD OF BED slightly вҖ” helps with urination. Then bed to LOWEST. Disposable wipes within reach.
8. Call light in resident's hand. "Signal when done." CLOSE DOOR.
9. When signaled: return. Wash hands. CLEAN GLOVES. Take covered urinal or have resident hand it to you. Cover it.
10. Discard wipes. Remove bed protector.
11. вӯҗ Take covered urinal to bathroom. Note COLOR, ODOR, QUALITY (clear vs cloudy, sediment). Pour carefully into toilet along inner bowl edge.
12. Faucet with paper towel. Rinse urinal with COLD WATER. Swirl, empty, flush. Store per policy.
13. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
14. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy. Call light. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 38 вҖ” ASSISTING DEPENDENT RESIDENT WITH DINING
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Meal tray, clothing protector, hand wipes, chair
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Confirm resident's name + tray matches diet card BEFORE serving
вӯҗ Bite-sized pieces; tell resident WHAT each bite is; WAIT for full chew and swallow before next bite
вӯҗ Keep resident sitting UPRIGHT for AT LEAST 30 MINUTES after eating вҖ” prevents aspiration
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Check DIET CARD. Ask resident to SAY THEIR NAME (or check wristband/photo). Confirm tray matches diet card вҖ” right tray for right resident.
4. Raise head of bed to FULL 90 DEGREES (like sitting in a chair, spine vertical).
5. Lock wheels. Adjust bed height so your EYES = resident's EYES when you sit beside them.
6. Swing overbed table across. Set tray in resident's visual field.
7. If can't self-clean hands: wipe both hands for them.
8. Clothing protector across chest if desired вҖ” tuck into collar.
9. Pull chair to BEDSIDE. Sit at EYE LEVEL. Sit on STRONG SIDE.
10. Point to each item. Let resident CHOOSE order.
11. вӯҗ Check food temperature (back of hand to container). Cut into BITE-SIZED PIECES (pea-sized for swallowing difficulty). For each bite: TELL them what it is, wait for mouth to open, guide utensil in, WAIT for full CHEW and SWALLOW before next bite. Watch throat вҖ” look for swallow. STOP if coughing, gagging, or food returning вҖ” ALERT NURSE.
12. Offer beverage THROUGHOUT (not just end). Touch rim to LOWER LIP first. Small sips. Slow pour.
13. Talk to resident. Watch their face, not just the food. Wipe mouth/chin during meal.
14. After meal: wipe mouth, chin, hands. Remove clothing protector.
15. вӯҗ CHECK TRAY before removing вҖ” dentures? Eyeglasses? Personal items? Remove those first.
16. вӯҗ UPRIGHT for AT LEAST 30 MINUTES after eating. Do NOT lower head of bed immediately.
17. After 30 min: bed to LOWEST. Remove privacy. Tray to collection area.
18. Call light. Wash hands. Report swallowing difficulties. Document.

front:
SKILL 39 вҖ” MEASURING FLUID INTAKE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: I&O form, pen
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Record EVERY fluid taken by mouth throughout shift вҖ” including liquid-at-room-temp foods (Jell-O, ice cream)
вӯҗ Convert all to MILLILITERS (1 oz вүҲ 30 mL)
вӯҗ Total must be accurate within 15 mL
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Throughout shift вҖ” record EVERY fluid taken by mouth: water, juice, milk, broth, coffee, tea, soda, AND liquid-at-room-temp foods (ice cream, Jell-O). Note TIME + WHAT + AMOUNT each occurrence.
4. вӯҗ End of shift: convert all amounts to MILLILITERS (1 oz вүҲ 30 mL).
5. вӯҗ ADD UP all individual amounts for entire shift. Must be accurate within 15 mL.
6. Call light. Wash hands.
7. Record total FLUID INTAKE in INPUT column of I&O sheet.
8. Report to nurse.

front:
SKILL 40 вҖ” MAKING AN UNOCCUPIED BED
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Fitted or flat bottom sheet, top sheet, draw sheet, blanket, pillowcases, gloves, bed protector if needed
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Roll soiled sheet with SOILED SIDE INWARD вҖ” never touch scrubs with it
вӯҗ Bottom sheet pulled TAUT with no wrinkles; hospital corners at foot
вӯҗ Pillowcase: inside-out over your arm, grab pillow end, pull case over pillow
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Wash hands. Gather ALL clean linens вҖ” carry to bedside. Set on CLEAN surface (chair/overbed table, NOT floor).
2. Lock ALL 4 bed wheels. FLATTEN bed. Raise to comfortable WORKING HEIGHT. Gloves on.
3. вӯҗ Loosen all corners of soiled sheet. ROLL soiled sheet toward center вҖ” SOILED SIDE INWARD (burrito roll, head to foot). Hold AWAY from body. Carry to HAMPER. Pillowcases: peel inside-out, drop in hamper.
4. вӯҗ Remove gloves. WASH HANDS.
5. Open CLEAN BOTTOM SHEET. If fitted: stretch corners over mattress starting with head corner nearest you. If flat: center it, tuck using HOSPITAL CORNERS (45В° fold then tuck remainder). Sheet pulled TAUT вҖ” no wrinkles. Draw sheet across middle third, tuck both sides.
6. TOP SHEET over entire bed вҖ” center so equal hang each side. TUCK under foot mattress. HOSPITAL CORNERS at both bottom corners. BLANKET over top sheet. Fold TOP SHEET over blanket 6 inches (neat cuff). FAN-FOLD both down toward foot for easy entry.
7. вӯҗ PILLOWCASE: grasp closed end, flip INSIDE OUT over your hand/arm. Grab one NARROW END of pillow with covered hand. Pull case DOWN over pillow вҖ” flips right-side-out. OPEN END FACES AWAY FROM DOOR.
8. Lower bed to LOWEST position.
9. Carry soiled linen hamper to laundry area. Wash hands. Document.
